Button.TooltipReference: You have unread mail in your inbox.
You are over your parcel limit! Retrieve the excess ones soon or risk losing them!

Label.TooltipReference: Determines how often you are hit and the amount of damage taken
Determines your encumbrance limit and is a factor in melee damage
Influences your hit point and endurance totals
Influences your AC and helps you avoid incoming damage
Influences success to make a successful attack, damage done, and chance raise skills
Determines your mana (for some classes) and influences your chance to raise skills
Determines your mana (for some classes) and influences your chance to raise skills
Influences pricing on many vendors and influences success of charm and mesmerization spells
Shows the speed at which you attack - the base is 100%
